zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Ragsdale於大約1700年出生在美國維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治時，她的父親Godfrey Ragsdale III25歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Baxter25歲。她於1720年與Seth Pettypool在美國維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1773年在美國維吉尼亞州梅可倫波格享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Ragsdale于大约1700年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州普林斯 喬治时，她的父亲Godfrey Ragsdale III25岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Baxter25岁。她于1720年与Seth Pettypool在美国弗吉尼亚州结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1773年在美国弗吉尼亚州梅可倫波格享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ragsdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name from Ragdale (Leicestershire). The placename appears to derive from Old English hraca ‘throat, gulley, narrow pass’ (genitive hracan) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’. From the 16th century onward the more common form of the surname is Ragsdale with an intrusive -s-.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Ragsdale was born about 1700, in Prince George, Virginia, United States, her father, Godfrey Ragsdale III, was 25 and her mother, Mary Elizabeth Baxter, was 25. She married Seth Pettypool in 1720, in Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1773, in Mecklenburg, Virginia, United States, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Ragsdale est née environ 1700, à Prince George, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Godfrey Ragsdale III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Baxter, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Seth Pettypool en 1720, à Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1773, à Mecklenburg, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Martha Ragsdale um 1700 in Prince George, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfrey Ragsdale III 25 und ihre Mutter Mary Elizabeth Baxter 25. Sie hat 1720 in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Seth Pettypool geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1773 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Mecklenburg, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

Lei sposato Seth Pettypool nel 1720, nel Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1773, nel Mecklenburg, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Ragsdaleが約1700年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州プリンス ジョーッジで生まれた時，父Godfrey Ragsdale IIIは25歳，母Mary Elizabeth Baxterは25歳であった。1720年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州でSeth Pettypoolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1773年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州メックレンブルグで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Ragsdale(이)가 대략 1700년 미국 버지니아 주 플린스 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfrey Ragsdale III(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Baxter(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1720년 미국 버지니아 주에서 Seth Pettypool(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1773년 미국 버지니아 주 클렌버그에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Ragsdale nasceu aproximadamente 1700, em Prince George, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Godfrey Ragsdale III, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Baxter, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Seth Pettypool em 1720, em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1773, em Mecklenburg, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Ragsdale родилась около 1700 г. в местности принц джеордж, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Godfrey Ragsdale III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Baxter, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Seth Pettypool в 1720 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1773 г. в местности меккленбург, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Ragsdale nació aproximadamente 1700, en Prince George, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Godfrey Ragsdale III, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Baxter, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Seth Pettypool en 1720, en Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1773, en Mecklenburg, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 75 años.
